instructions: Please rate each statement based on your experience with the WBSMS. Use the 5-point Likert scale.

parts.title: Performance Expectancy (PE)
parts.intro: The system helps me accomplish my tasks more effectively.

items.statement: The system helps me accomplish my work tasks more quickly.
Using the system increases my productivity.
The system provides information that is useful and accurate for my work.
The outputs generated by the system meet my job requirements.
Overall, the system improves the quality of my work.

parts.title: Effort Expectancy (EE)
parts.intro: The system is easy to use and learn.

items.statement: The interface of the system is clear and easy to understand.
It was easy to learn how to use the system.
I can use the system without needing much assistance.
The system's navigation is logical and straightforward.
The system requires minimal effort to operate.

parts.title: Social Influence (SI)
parts.intro: People around me support my use of the system.

items.statement: My supervisors/instructors encourage me to use the system.
My colleagues/classmates use and recommend the system.
The institution supports the use of this system for official tasks.
People who are important to me think I should use the system.
Using the system is considered a standard practice in my organization.

parts.title: Facilitating Conditions (FC)
parts.intro: Resources and support are available to help me use the system.

items.statement: I have the necessary equipment (device, internet) to use the system.
Technical support is available when I encounter problems with the system.
The system is compatible with the devices and tools I commonly use.
I have received sufficient training or orientation to use the system.
When I encounter difficulties, help is readily available.

parts.title: Behavioral Intention (BI)
parts.intro: I intend to continue using the system in the future.

items.statement: I intend to continue using this system in the future.
I plan to use the system more frequently than I currently do.
I would recommend this system to others.
Given the chance, I would choose to use this system over alternatives.
I am satisfied with the system and would support its continued use.

parts.title: Open-Ended Questions
questions: What feature of the system do you find most useful? Why?
What difficulties or challenges did you encounter while using the system?
What improvements or additional features would you suggest for the system?
How has the system affected your workflow or daily tasks?
Any other comments, suggestions, or feedback?
